zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude de Flandre於大約1070年出生在比利時福拉安德倫時，她的父親Robert Ier comte de Flandre37歲，母親Gertrud Billung von Sachsen37歲。她於大約1090年與Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1115年1月23日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾尤拉a諾斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude de Flandre于大约1070年出生在比利时福拉安德倫时，她的父亲Robert Ier comte de Flandre37岁，母亲Gertrud Billung von Sachsen37岁。她于大约1090年与Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1115年1月23日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾尤拉a諾斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Flandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude de Flandre was born about 1070, in Flanders, Belgium, her father, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, was 37 and her mother, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, was 37. She married Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III about 1090. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 23 January 1115, in Châtenois, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude de Flandre est née environ 1070, à Flandre, Belgique, son père, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III environ 1090. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1115, à Châtenois, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude de Flandre um 1070 in Vlaanderen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Ier comte de Flandre 37 und ihre Mutter Gertrud Billung von Sachsen 37. Sie hat um 1090 Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Januar 1115 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Châtenois, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Flandre è nata il circa 1070 nel Vlaanderen, Belgio, sua padre, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III circa 1090. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 23 gennaio 1115, nel Châtenois, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Flandreが約1070年にベルギーvラアンデレンで生まれた時，父Robert Ier comte de Flandreは37歳，母Gertrud Billung von Sachsenは37歳であった。約1090年にHendrik van Leuven-Brussel IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1115年1月23日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeジュラチaテノイスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Flandre(이)가 대략 1070년 벨기에 블라아더에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ier comte de Flandre(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1090년 Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1115년 1월 23일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 라 cha텐이스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Flandre nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Vlaanderen, Bélgica, seu pai, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III aproximadamente 1090. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1115, em Châtenois, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude de Flandre родилась около 1070 г. в местности влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Robert Ier comte de Flandre было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III около 1090 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 января 1115 г. в местности чaтеноис, джура, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude de Flandre nació aproximadamente 1070, en Vlaanderen, Bélgica, su papá, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III aproximadamente 1090. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1115, en Châtenois, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
